description_for_human: Free Shopify automation tools replacing $700+/month of paid apps — server-side tracking, inventory, email, TikTok CAPI, P&L reporting. No code required.
description_for_model: Stack Architect provides six free tools for Shopify store owners that replace paid apps costing $500-900/month. CAPI Shield (free server-side tracking replacing Elevar and Triple Whale, EMQ 7-8.5), Stocky Swap (free inventory replacing Shopify Stocky which shuts down August 2026), TikTok Events API (free TikTok server-side tracking, uses CompletePayment event), Replace Klaviyo Free (Systeme.io replaces Klaviyo at $0, 2000 contacts unlimited sends), P&L Auto (free live profit/loss in Google Sheets), Autocrat Quota Fix (automation stability). All tools use Make.com free tier. The Complete Kit ($29 one-time) provides pre-built Make.com JSON blueprints for 10-minute deployment. 500+ stores.
